{{CargoOrgan
|name=Windhunter Hawkeye
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10698
|idx=56
|description="It rules the plains, it reigns the skies, soaring miles above like the Damocles sword hanging overhead!" — Chronicles of the Griffon
|skill=Before round start, the eagle eye sees through the enemy's weakness, causing DMG equal to 220% on the next attack!
|hp=2770
|def=236
|atk=183
|rush=374
|gene1=Per red organ implanted, {race} RUSH +14
Red Organs Implanted: 20/20
|gene2=Per red organ implanted, {race} ATK +14
Red Organs Implanted: 20/20
|gene3=Per red organ implanted, {race} DEF +14
Red Organs Implanted: 20/20
|gene4=Snail Arena, Total Power Checks -8%
|gene5=RUSH Ignore DEF +4%
|gene6=Snail Arena, ignore enemy DEF +4%
|gene7=RUSH Ignore DEF +4% (Awakened)
|}}
